task_description: Implement Chapter 2.4.1, 2.4.2, 2.4.3, 2.4.4, and 2.4.5 of the Product Design Bible - Complete Album Experience with premium cinematic hero, dynamic color extraction, enhanced tracklist with playback integration, album metadata sections, sticky album bar, fullscreen artwork viewer, and all supporting sections (credits, stats, description, timeline, similar albums, recommended artists, videos, AI insights, external links).

verification.summary: bun run lint passes with zero errors/warnings. bun run build compiles TypeScript and generates all pages successfully. No test runner configured so test quality check is skipped. No Dockerfile in project.
